events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario involves fall protection equipment with frayed/burned webbing. This is clearly non-compliant - OSHA 1910.140 and 1926 Subpart M require that personal fall protection equipment be removed from service if it shows signs of damage like fraying, burning, or other degradation. Frayed/burned webbing on a harness or lanyard means the equipment must be removed from service immediately.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (fall protection failure can lead to serious injury or death)
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded
Percent complete: rough-complete stage, maybe 70%
Confidence: high, 0.95
